name: Ugly Duckling Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together the cake and pudding mixes according to package directions.
3. Add the fruit cocktail, coconut, eggs, oil, brown sugar, and nuts to the mix.
4. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
